hero.heading: Contact & Booking
hero.subtext: Give us a call, send us a message, or just come in. We're easy to deal with.

steps.title: Call or Message
steps.desc: Tell us what you need and we'll find a time that works for you.

steps.title: Drop Off Your Vehicle
steps.desc: Bring it in at the agreed time. We'll go over what's needed and give you a quote.

steps.title: Pick It Up
steps.desc: We'll call you when it's ready. Drive away knowing the job's been done right.

bookingForm.heading: Request a Booking
bookingForm.subtext: Fill in your details and we'll confirm your booking via email as soon as possible.
